zh.lifeSummary: 當William Abernethy 3rd of Saltoun於1285年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾易亞斯特 薩爾圖時，他的父親William Abernethy 2nd of Saltoun33歲，母親Margaret20歲。他於1333年登記服兵役。他去世於1345年在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Abernethy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Abernathy
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Abernethy in southeastern Perthshire. The placename is of Pictish origin, meaning ‘mouth of the river Nethy’.

History: This was the name of a cadet branch of MacDuff earls of Fife and one of the surnames of the Scots who settled in northern Ireland during the ‘plantation’ in the 17th century, and it was brought to the US as the name of a Southern plantation owner (in a different sense of the word ‘plantation’).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Abernethy 3rd of Saltoun was born in 1285, in East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, William Abernethy 2nd of Saltoun, was 33 and his mother, Margaret, was 20. He registered for military service in 1333. He died in 1345, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Abernethy 3rd of Saltoun est né en 1285, à East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, William Abernethy 2nd of Saltoun, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 20 ans. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1333. Il est décédé en 1345, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Abernethy 3rd of Saltoun 1285 in East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Abernethy 2nd of Saltoun 33 und seine Mutter Margaret 20. Er hat sich 1333 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1345 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Abernethy 3rd of Saltoun è nato il nel 1285 nel East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William Abernethy 2nd of Saltoun, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 20 anni. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1333. Morì nel 1345, nel Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Abernethy 3rd of Saltounが1285年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアエアスト サルトウンで生まれた時，父William Abernethy 2nd of Saltounは33歳，母Margaretは20歳であった。彼は1333年に兵役登録をした。彼は1345年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Abernethy 3rd of Saltoun(이)가 1285년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 이스트 살토우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Abernethy 2nd of Saltoun(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1333년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1345년 스컷랜드 압르디실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Abernethy 3rd of Saltoun nasceu em 1285, em East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Abernethy 2nd of Saltoun, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 20 anos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1333. Ele faleceu em 1345, em Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Abernethy 3rd of Saltoun родился в 1285 г. в местности эаст салтоун, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Abernethy 2nd of Saltoun было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 20. В 1333 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1345 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Abernethy 3rd of Saltoun nació en 1285, en East Saltoun, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, William Abernethy 2nd of Saltoun, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 20 años. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1333. Murió en 1345, en Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 60 años.
